_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Master index of the Higgins Unity Framework repository. Maps every folder with status, purpose, and AI training notes.

ai-refresh.purpose: AI speed-loading context. Any AI starts here.

science.purpose: All scientific work organized by subject.

subfolders.reference: Core reference collection — 9 documents, start-here learning path
subfolders.core: EITT mathematics, complete explanation, formulas, user handbook
subfolders.quantum: HUF-QIT correspondence — 9 isomorphisms, Bell test, 3 books [NEW]
subfolders.eitt: EITT evidence chain — 4 proofs, adversarial tests, Grok/ChatGPT briefs [NEW]
subfolders.coda-monitoring: Perturbation-based drift detection protocol, EMBER/NGFS results [NEW]
subfolders.loudspeaker-analogy: Origin story — crossover networks as compositions [NEW]

huf-gov.purpose: Active governance — standards, protocols, kill tests, evidence, case studies.

tools.purpose: Everything runnable — pipeline scripts, diagnostics, spectrum analyzers.

drafts.purpose: Conference materials, paper submissions, proposals, books.

subfolders.codawork-2026: CoDaWork 2026 Coimbra — presentation, primers, preparation, extended materials
subfolders.codawork-2026/extended: Extended results, EITT handout, coffee table [NEW]
subfolders.papers: Paper submissions across 7 target venues + Ramsar outreach

briefings.purpose: Session briefings and AI handoffs — chronological discovery record. [NEW]

subfolders.ember: EMBER Global Electricity Review processed data [NEW]

dormant.purpose: Paused branches — sleeping, not dead. Nothing dies here. [NEW]

archive.purpose: Superseded, rejected, or completed work. What failed always speaks louder.

known_pitfalls: EITT = Entropy-Invariant Time Transformer. NEVER Ternary or Temporal.
HUF-GOV: open loop ONLY. Instrument reads, never actuates.
Dormant branches are valuable. Do not discard.
